collapse_behavior.notes: stable_orbit_cloud is the default. infinite_collapse can reproduce the prior collapse behavior. black_hole_capture pins captured particles near a visual horizon. respawn_on_capture can recycle particles for installation-style continuous motion.
collapse_behavior.v1_3A_note: Geospatial crab particle field starts paused/stable. Press SPACE in renderer to arm/run.
collapse_behavior.v1_3B_note: Safe geospatial startup. Physics remains paused until SPACE/runtime_state arms it.
collapse_behavior.v1_3C_note: Geospatial crab data must bind to Python solver buffers. Expected particle count equals CSV row count.

particles.notes: v0.5A uses collapse behavior controls to prevent uncontrolled infinitesimal collapse unless selected deliberately.
particles.v1_3B_note: Python solver buffers are allocated from merged_navdata.csv row count; expected current count is 99966.
